unit.name: Luna
unit.gameplay_identity: Mage calibration unit carrying Liaison, Kaleidoscope through one decisive combat silhouette.
unit.strongest_preserved_hook: none; one body-integrated fibrous refractor ligament running from forward palm to opposite heel
unit.dominant_prop_or_anatomy: none; one body-integrated fibrous refractor ligament running from forward palm to opposite heel
unit.supernatural_cost: connections split the eyes into incompatible gaze pairs and add stress-age seams

psychology.core_wound: Two people she depended on formed a direct bond and excluded her the moment they no longer needed an intermediary.
psychology.private_want: She wants every relationship to require her presence so exclusion becomes structurally impossible.
psychology.primary_fear: The two sides will speak directly, compare what she told them, and discover they are safer without her.
psychology.survival_strategy: She becomes the indispensable translator and controls which version of reality each side receives.
psychology.villainous_distortion: She fractures perception, manufactures conflict, and offers herself as the only safe bridge through the conflict she created.
psychology.current_emotional_state: Warm invitation split by cool surveillance of an unseen second party.
psychology.emotional_contradiction: Performed intimacy versus terror of direct connection that excludes her.
psychology.face_direction: One gaze pair follows the open inviting palm while the other pair tracks a second party; the mouth offers safety while lower-lid and throat tension expose fear of comparison.
psychology.pose_direction: A narrow split stance tensions exactly one physical diagonal refractor ligament from forward palm to opposite heel while the free hand remains empty and controls a second social vector.
psychology.forbidden_read: No neutral model, friendly mediator, generic seductress, rainbow crystal mage, black catsuit, ribbon dancer, gacha heroine, or harmless pretty woman.
